featured.author: Greg Bell
featured.text: Great spot to relax and listen to local music. Food and service were amazing.

featured.author: Karl Sauer
featured.text: Excellent fried green tomatoes, great service with a hometown vibe. Played bandingo and enjoyed happy hour beers.

featured.author: Shannon Schafer
featured.text: Neal our server was great. So was music bingo. Love the hometown atmosphere! Whistle Stop is one of our favorites!

featured.author: Kenneth Miller
featured.text: The burgers were great and Fridays have bandingo. Excellent happy hour.

featured.author: Daniel Spisak
featured.text: Great drinks, good food, better spot to watch the Rays and Lightning game!!!

featured.author: Mike Oszust
featured.text: Food was delicious, and Neal's service was excellent. Highly recommend!

featured.author: Eric Fenech
featured.text: Amazing experience beginning at the hostess stand. The best food and vibes!

featured.author: Terry Johnson
featured.text: I had a business meeting here recently. The server was outstanding. I like the environment and will definitely come back again and try a different meal.
